UG-93  INSPECTION OF VESSELS. (a) Each pressure vessel shall be inspected by the Inspector during construction and after completion. Materials shall comply with UG-80. Material identification shall be in accordance with UG-81. (b) Welded joints shall be examined as required by UW-11. See also UW-51 for examination methods. (c) The Inspector shall witness hydrostatic tests in accordance with UG-99. When applicable, UG-100 governs pneumatic tests. Except as permitted by UG-47, all vessels shall have inspection openings. Refer to UG-94 for marking. Subject to completion, UG-120 governs data reports. For certification, see also UG-117.
